title: senecio pentactinus
intro: Senecio pentactinus, also known as Five-angled Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatotoxic compounds, such as pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which are toxic to the liver. However, the non-toxic compounds in Senecio pentactinus are also valued for their health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and immune system support. Traditionally, Senecio pentactinus is used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions, although its use should be carefully monitored due to its potential toxicity and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
